introSection.heading1: I'm deeply passionate about HTML/CSS and modern web technologies.
introSection.heading2: Over the years, I’ve spent a good amount of time working with JavaScript, TypeScript, React and NodeJS on the frontend and backend — as well as Java, Kotlin, and Spring Boot for enterprise-grade backend services.
introSection.heading3: My field of interest includes backend engineering with
introSection.heading4: Java, Kotlin, and Spring Boot — building scalable REST APIs, microservices.
introSection.heading5: Recently, I’ve been leveraging AI tools like Claude, ChatGPT and Cursor to accelerate development — writing cleaner code faster, drafting architecture, and debugging smarter.
